summary: Frontend testing for new permissions (hide_cash_expected, hide_recent_orders) and cash register dialog. All features verified working correctly for admin user.

issues: IndexedDB 'is_synced' index error in offline sync - pre-existing issue, not related to current changes

critical_code_review_comments: New permissions 'hide_cash_expected' and 'hide_recent_orders' correctly added to Settings.js ALL_PERMISSIONS array (lines 357-358)
Dashboard.js correctly implements hide_recent_orders condition at line 2011: !user?.permissions?.includes('hide_recent_orders')
Dashboard.js correctly implements hide_cash_expected conditions at lines 2274, 2295, 2407, 2417, 2461 for cash register dialog
Admin users see all fields (no permissions restriction) as expected - hasDashboardPermission returns true for admin role
context_for_next_testing_agent: New permissions hide_cash_expected and hide_recent_orders verified in Settings.js and Dashboard.js. Admin user sees all fields. Cash register dialog opens without errors with 7 denomination inputs. POS page loads correctly.

test_results.login_works_for_admin: PASSED - Admin login with hanialdujaili@gmail.com / Hani@2024 works correctly
test_results.dashboard_loads_without_errors: PASSED - Dashboard loads with all quick actions, statistics, and recent orders section
test_results.settings_page_shows_new_permissions: PASSED - Found 'إخفاء النقدي والمتوقع' and 'إخفاء آخر الطلبات' in user edit dialog permissions list
test_results.cash_register_dialog_opens: PASSED - Dialog opens without errors, shows 7 denomination inputs (250, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 25000, 50000)
test_results.pos_page_loads: PASSED - POS page loads with order type buttons (داخل، سفري، توصيل) and cart area
test_results.new_permissions_in_user_settings: PASSED - Both new permissions visible in Settings > المستخدمين when editing a user
test_results.recent_orders_visible_for_admin: PASSED - 'آخر الطلبات' section visible on Dashboard for admin user (no hide_recent_orders permission)

hide_cash_expected_permission.status: VERIFIED - Permission exists and is conditionally checked in cash register dialog

hide_recent_orders_permission.status: VERIFIED - Permission exists and is conditionally checked for recent orders section

cash_register_dialog.scrollable: VERIFIED - Dialog content fits well within viewport
cash_register_dialog.denomination_inputs: VERIFIED - 7 inputs for Iraqi currency denominations
cash_register_dialog.close_button_visible: VERIFIED - 'تأكيد إغلاق الصندوق والوردية' button visible at bottom
